author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(sham): remove Object.freeze sham (#2860)
body:
This is safe to remove because of the following reasons:

1. Object.freeze is supported on all browsers above IE8
2. We use Object.freeze _nowhere_ (not even in the helper)

This is done for the following reasons

1. This will allow the library to be free of side effects
2. an incredibly tiny, not even measurable size difference by removing those few lines
